description: Late account, names and numbers. The heading of each side of the bifolio is dated sequentially 6-7 Ṣafar s[ene] __38 AH. Based on the paleography this year is likely 938, 1038, or 1138 AH (1531, 1628, or 1725 CE). With future research the comparison of the names mentioned here with definitively dated documents will make it possible to determine the exact dating. AA. MCD.
tags: FGP stub, 16th c or later, late prosopography
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בJRL.
